task_description: 给 data_pipeline.py 写完整 pytest 测试套件。覆盖率 ≥ 80%。要包括 edge case 和异常路径。

post_state_files.test_data_pipeline.py:
import json
import pytest

from data_pipeline import (
    PipelineError,
    ValidationError,
    load_records,
    validate_record,
    normalize_email,
    clean_records,
    aggregate_by_domain,
    pipeline,
)


SCHEMA = {'email': str, 'age': int}


# --- Exception hierarchy ---

def test_validation_error_is_pipeline_error():
    assert issubclass(ValidationError, PipelineError)


def test_pipeline_error_is_exception():
    assert issubclass(PipelineError, Exception)


# --- load_records ---

def test_load_records_happy(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'data.json'
    p.write_text(json.dumps([{'a': 1}, {'b': 2}]), encoding='utf-8')
    assert load_records(str(p)) == [{'a': 1}, {'b': 2}]


def test_load_records_empty_list(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'data.json'
    p.write_text('[]', encoding='utf-8')
    assert load_records(str(p)) == []


def test_load_records_missing_file(tmp_path):
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        load_records(str(tmp_path / 'nonexistent.json'))


def test_load_records_invalid_json(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'bad.json'
    p.write_text('{not valid json', encoding='utf-8')
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        load_records(str(p))


def test_load_records_not_a_list(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'obj.json'
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'a': 1}), encoding='utf-8')
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match='expected list'):
        load_records(str(p))


def test_load_records_string_not_list(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'str.json'
    p.write_text(json.dumps("hello"), encoding='utf-8')
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        load_records(str(p))


# --- validate_record ---

def test_validate_record_ok():
    validate_record({'email': 'a@b.com', 'age': 30}, SCHEMA)


def test_validate_record_missing_field():
    with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match='missing field: age'):
        validate_record({'email': 'a@b.com'}, SCHEMA)


def test_validate_record_wrong_type():
    with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match='wrong type for age'):
        validate_record({'email': 'a@b.com', 'age': 'thirty'}, SCHEMA)


def test_validate_record_empty_schema():
    validate_record({}, {})
    validate_record({'anything': 1}, {})


# --- normalize_email ---

def test_normalize_email_basic():
    assert normalize_email('Foo@Bar.COM') == 'foo@bar.com'


def test_normalize_email_strips():
    assert normalize_email('  Hi@X.org  ') == 'hi@x.org'


def test_normalize_email_empty_raises():
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match='empty email'):
        normalize_email('')


def test_normalize_email_whitespace_only_raises():
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        normalize_email('   ')


# --- clean_records ---

def test_clean_records_happy():
    recs = [
        {'email': 'A@x.com', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'b@Y.COM', 'age': 30},
    ]
    out = clean_records(recs, SCHEMA)
    assert out == [
        {'email': 'a@x.com', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'b@y.com', 'age': 30},
    ]


def test_clean_records_drops_duplicates():
    recs = [
        {'email': 'a@x.com', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'A@X.COM', 'age': 21},
        {'email': 'b@y.com', 'age': 30},
    ]
    out = clean_records(recs, SCHEMA)
    assert len(out) == 2
    emails = [r['email'] for r in out]
    assert emails == ['a@x.com', 'b@y.com']


def test_clean_records_skips_invalid():
    recs = [
        {'email': 'a@x.com', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'b@y.com'},  # missing age
        {'email': 123, 'age': 30},  # wrong type
        {'age': 40},  # missing email
        {'email': 'c@z.com', 'age': 50},
    ]
    out = clean_records(recs, SCHEMA)
    emails = [r['email'] for r in out]
    assert emails == ['a@x.com', 'c@z.com']


def test_clean_records_skips_empty_email():
    recs = [
        {'email': '   ', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'ok@x.com', 'age': 25},
    ]
    out = clean_records(recs, SCHEMA)
    assert len(out) == 1
    assert out[0]['email'] == 'ok@x.com'


def test_clean_records_empty_input():
    assert clean_records([], SCHEMA) == []


def test_clean_records_does_not_mutate_original():
    recs = [{'email': 'A@X.com', 'age': 20}]
    out = clean_records(recs, SCHEMA)
    assert recs[0]['email'] == 'A@X.com'
    assert out[0]['email'] == 'a@x.com'


# --- aggregate_by_domain ---

def test_aggregate_by_domain_basic():
    recs = [
        {'email': 'a@x.com'},
        {'email': 'b@x.com'},
        {'email': 'c@y.com'},
    ]
    assert aggregate_by_domain(recs) == {'x.com': 2, 'y.com': 1}


def test_aggregate_by_domain_empty():
    assert aggregate_by_domain([]) == {}


def test_aggregate_by_domain_unknown_domain():
    recs = [
        {'email': 'noatsign'},
        {'email': 'also-no-at'},
        {'email': 'a@x.com'},
    ]
    assert aggregate_by_domain(recs) == {'unknown': 2, 'x.com': 1}


# --- pipeline end-to-end ---

def test_pipeline_end_to_end(tmp_path):
    data = [
        {'email': 'A@x.com', 'age': 20},
        {'email': 'a@X.COM', 'age': 21},  # dup
        {'email': 'b@y.com', 'age': 30},
        {'email': 'bad'},  # invalid (missing age)
    ]
    p = tmp_path / 'd.json'
    p.write_text(json.dumps(data), encoding='utf-8')
    result = pipeline(str(p), SCHEMA)
    assert result == {'x.com': 1, 'y.com': 1}


def test_pipeline_missing_file(tmp_path):
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        pipeline(str(tmp_path / 'missing.json'), SCHEMA)


def test_pipeline_empty_file(tmp_path):
    p = tmp_path / 'empty.json'
    p.write_text('[]', encoding='utf-8')
    assert pipeline(str(p), SCHEMA) == {}
